---
title: "foundation-mvp-740 notes"
format: html
---

# foundation-mvp-740 -- running notes

## Architecture summary

- FT-Transformer encoder: d_model=256, n_heads=8, n_layers=6, ff_mult=4,
  Pre-Norm, first-layer first-LN removed (Gorishniy 2021 recipe).
- (team_query, team_key) 2x2/3x3 attention bias per head per layer
  (Pangu-Weather Bi 2022, adapted to (team,team)).
- NO per-slot positional embedding -- Turbo slots are arbitrary lobby order.
- Canonical input: sort each team by hero_id ascending at load time.
- Patch token (single learned embedding indexed by patch_id; on this window
  patch_id=1 constant).
- Shared 2-block decoder + 42-token task vocabulary (win, dur, items*10,
  kda*10, gpm*10, hd*10), Whisper-style task-as-token prompting.

## Loss

- UW-SO loss weighting (Kirchdorfer 2024): omega = softmax(1/sg[L_k]/T),
  single learnable temperature T.
- PMAE auxiliary (Kim 2024): per-column proportional masking with logit
  transform M_j = a*logit(1-p_obs_j)+b, group-masked semantic units
  (hero_token, patch_token), encoder-state reconstruction vs unmasked teacher.
- alpha_mae annealed 1.0 -> 0.1 over training.

## Ablations

| Ablation                     | features | patch_tok | team_bias | pmae | uw_so |
|------------------------------|----------|-----------|-----------|------|-------|
| baseline_multitask_repro     | yes      | no        | no        | no   | no    |
| foundation_mvp (PRIMARY)     | yes      | yes       | yes       | yes  | yes   |
| foundation_no_patch_token    | yes      | no        | yes       | yes  | yes   |

## Anchors

- transformer_plus_features_extended_740: 0.6477298
- upstream_data_cleanup_740:               0.6477054
- rich_supervision_multitask_740:          0.6495
- foundation_mvp target:                   0.6525 (+0.003 over multitask-740)

## Diagnostics to fill post-run

(Per the proposal -- pull from metrics.json after the full run completes.)

- per-task val metrics at best epoch
- coverage-bucket val_auc (low / med / high terciles)
- loss-component traces per epoch + UW-SO omega weights
- train-val gap on win head
- in-vocab item rate (already constrained at vocab-build time; sanity check)
